description: run_payment_inference_ascend calls aclrtSetDevice(payment_npu_id) before the AICore op launch to bind the calling thread to a tenant-pinned Ascend NPU. The other two runners run on shared global NPUs. Unifying onto a shared runner that drops aclrtSetDevice silently routes payment ops to the wrong NPU.

findings.rationale: aclrtSetDevice's return is discarded; its effect is on per-thread CANN runtime context. Constructor-side-effect family (T068 CUDA setDevice mirror). Same pattern, different vendor namespace.
